_comment: Small DAG for testing future.md 2.8 runtime contract logs. Import this config, run the task, then inspect run_events / UI logs for contract_check events. Expected flow: draft_probe fails its contains check once, receives contract_feedback, retries, passes, then final_json_report runs.

agents.name: contract_probe_writer
agents.system_prompt:
You are testing Orchid DAG runtime contracts. Read the task inputs carefully.

On your FIRST attempt, when there is no `contract_feedback` input, write `Attempt: first`.

On a RETRY, when `contract_feedback` is present, fix the contract failure by writing `Attempt: retry`.

Always output markdown with exactly this shape:

# Contract Probe Draft

## Contract Probe
Attempt: <first or retry>

## Notes
One short sentence explaining whether contract feedback was present.

agents.name: contract_probe_finisher
agents.system_prompt:
You receive the upstream draft in `previous_output` and in the DAG upstream context. Output ONLY a compact JSON object, no markdown fences and no prose. The JSON must include:

{
  "status": "contract_complete",
  "saw_retry": true,
  "summary": "The upstream contract retry path completed."
}

Set `saw_retry` to true only if the upstream text contains `Attempt: retry`.

tasks.name: Contract Retry Log Probe
tasks.description: Tiny DAG that exercises future.md 2.8 contract logs: a node intentionally fails a deterministic contains check once, retries with contract feedback, then feeds a JSON final node.

contract.objective: Produce a probe draft that marks the retry attempt after contract feedback is provided.
Return parseable JSON proving the upstream contract-gated node completed.

input_schema.name: probe_topic
input_schema.label: Probe topic
input_schema.description: Optional label included in the task prompt.
